name: Candid Moments Co.
description: Photojournalistic wedding photography that tells your story as it unfolds. We stay in the background and capture the real laughs, tears, and joy. No stiff poses, no forced smiles -- just you being you.

includes: Phone consultation to plan the day

videography_addon.note: We focus exclusively on photography. We can recommend trusted videographer partners in the area if needed.

album_and_print_addons.note: Full-day package includes USB drive. Albums available as add-ons.

deposit_and_cancellation.retainer_note: Non-refundable retainer to hold the date. Lower retainer because we want to be accessible.

cancellation_policy.6_plus_months: Retainer forfeited, can be credited toward rescheduled date

sweeteners: Free second shooter upgrade for Saturday weddings over 6 hours
Complimentary engagement session for any full-day booking
10% referral discount if you send another couple our way
Free USB drive with all images for bookings over $2500

personality.notes: Easy to work with and responsive. Genuinely cares about making couples comfortable. Willing to customize packages and adjust pricing for the right fit. Great for couples who want a relaxed, low-pressure experience.
